claim: Independent cross-check confirms: YOLO demand router blocks PRD readiness when any evidence agent reports missing evidence, clarify recommendation, block recommendation, failed status, scope violations, or project locator violations. All blocking conditions convert to blockers array and prd_ready requires blockers.length === 0.

evidence.summary: prd_ready: blockers.length === 0 confirms final gate requires zero blockers.
evidence.why: This is the ultimate readiness condition that confirms all blocking conditions prevent PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Loop iterates required evidence agent roles and calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues(), evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues(), and projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() for each completed result.
evidence.why: This is where evidence agent results are transformed into blockers via blocking issue checks.

evidence.summary: Lines 496-502 push EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker when missing.length > 0.
evidence.why: Direct independent confirmation that missing evidence arrays generate blockers.

evidence.summary: Lines 503-509 push EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED based on recommendation, verdict, or status values.
evidence.why: Direct independent confirmation that clarify and block recommendations generate blockers.

evidence.summary: Lines 440-446 in evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues() return EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker when evidence records lack valid scope declaration.
evidence.why: Direct independent confirmation that missing scope declarations generate blockers.

evidence.summary: Lines 517-522 return PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED for project scope without path; lines 524-529 return PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE when evidence lacks project scope.
evidence.why: Direct independent confirmation that project locator violations generate blockers.

evidence.summary: Assertions verify prd_ready is false and EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers are present.
evidence.why: Test coverage independently confirming missing/clarify blocking behavior.

evidence.summary: Assertions verify prd_ready is false when cross-checker and verifier results are missing.
evidence.why: Test coverage independently confirming required agent blocking behavior.

evidence.summary: Assertions verify prd_ready is false and EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker is present for scope-less evidence.
evidence.why: Test coverage independently confirming scope validation blocking behavior.

evidence.summary: Assertions verify prd_ready is false and PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blocker is present for locator-less project evidence.
evidence.why: Test coverage independently confirming project locator blocking behavior.

evidence.summary: Line 56 states any blocker, unconfirmed assumption, or required evidence missing不得标记 prd_ready=true.
evidence.why: Product documentation independently confirming the blocking policy contract.

evidence.summary: Lines 591-596 set prd_ready: false when boundaryBlockers.length > 0 and merge boundary blockers into readiness blockers.
evidence.why: Implementation confirming evidence dispatch adds boundary violation blockers and forces blocked status.

risks: If evidence agents fail to report missing data in the missing array, blockers will not be generated
If evidence scope validation logic has bugs, invalid evidence could pass through
If boundary snapshot detection misses file changes, project mutations could go undetected

result.notes: Independent cross-check strongly confirms the explorer claim. All blocking conditions are independently verified: router.ts lines 481-511 implement missing/clarify/block blocking, lines 438-447 implement scope validation blocking, lines 513-530 implement project locator blocking, line 756 enforces blockers.length === 0 for prd_ready, and tests at lines 144-202, 313-353, 454-498, 547-591 prove each blocking path. Evidence dispatch lines 591-596 confirm boundary violations also add blockers. No conflicts or contradictions found.
